items.title: Messinger delivering for RailRiders out of the bullpen
items.summary: It was a rough start to the season for Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders relief pitcher Zach Messinger. In five appearances in April covering 12.1 innings, the 26-year-old right-hander allowed 13 runs (11 earned) on 15 hits with nine walks and 11 strikeouts. His earned-run average was 7.07. Since then, Messinger has turned things around. In his last […]

items.summary: The Yankees announced that they have selected right-hander Yovanny Cruz to their major league roster.
